mapper.sql: id, meeting_date as meetingDate, meeting_time as meetingTime, period_no as periodNo, location, leaders, content, status, creater as createdBy, created_time as createdAt, updated_time as updatedAt

${alias}.id, ${alias}.meeting_date as meetingDate, ${alias}.meeting_time as meetingTime, ${alias}.period_no as periodNo, ${alias}.location, ${alias}.leaders, ${alias}.content, ${alias}.status, ${alias}.creater as createdBy, ${alias}.created_time as createdAt, ${alias}.updated_time as updatedAt

${alias}.id, ${alias}.meeting_id as meetingId, ${alias}.topic_type as topicType, ${alias}.title, ${alias}.report_dept_id as reportDepartmentId, ${alias}.report_dept_name as reportDepartmentName, ${alias}.participant_dept_id as participantDeptId, ${alias}.participant_dept_name as participantDepartments, ${alias}.summary, ${alias}.notice, ${alias}.project_code as projectCode, ${alias}.sort_no as sortNo, ${alias}.status, ${alias}.start_time as startTime, ${alias}.end_time as endTime, ${alias}.actual_minutes as actualMinutes, ${alias}.conclusion, ${alias}.report_dept_signed as reportDepartmentSigned, ${alias}.created_at as createdAt, ${alias}.updated_at as updatedAt

u.f_user_id as id, u.f_user_id as user_id, u.f_user_id as employee_no, u.f_user_name as username, u.f_user_name as real_name, u.f_dept_id as department_id, d.f_dept_nm as department_name, u.f_phone as mobile, u.f_email as email, u.f_position as position, coalesce(a.authority_value, 0) as authority_value, case coalesce(a.authority_value, 0) when 1 then 'ADMIN' when 2 then 'LEADER' when 3 then 'SECRETARY' else 'PARTICIPANT' end as role

left join t_wxdept d on d.f_dept_id = u.f_dept_id left join ( select user_id, min(authority) as authority_value from t_meeting_authority where group_code = #{groupCode} group by user_id ) a on a.user_id = u.f_user_id
left join t_wxdept_users u on u.f_user_id = a.user_id left join t_wxdept d on d.f_dept_id = u.f_dept_id
